codeReview.summary: The commit successfully converts the hero from split cards into a single BETTER-led composition with updated tests, but it regresses honesty in the live-status framing by dropping the source-of-truth closed-beta qualifier.

issues.description: The compressed live-status copy says "Terminal & copy-trading shipping now", but the linked source-of-truth hero content still describes the product as "live in closed beta". Removing that qualifier overstates current availability and violates the feature requirement that live-vs-future framing stay honest.

The live-status regression test only checks for broad wording like /live|shipping|today/i, so it would not catch the missing closed-beta qualifier. Tightening this assertion would prevent the honesty regression from recurring.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-experience-worker skill requires reviewing `.factory/research/screenshots/` before landing-page or hero visual rewrites, but this worker transcript only shows `.factory/library/design-system.md` being read and never references the screenshot set, even though the handoff marked `skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: The transcript skeleton for session 6a58c065-ca96-4764-af0b-15bbde6efd92 contains `.factory/library/design-system.md` and many `agent-browser` commands, but no `screenshots` access; `/Users/test/vision/.factory/research/screenshots/` exists with `tradebetter-*.png`, `radiant-*.png`, and `vision-current-*.png`.

summary: Fail: the hero composition redesign is visually aligned with the milestone, but the live-status copy overstates current availability by omitting the underlying closed-beta qualifier. Test coverage also misses that honesty requirement.
